strategy_params.name: XAUUSD_HybridLLM_Breakout_M5-M15-H1
strategy_params.description: Hybrid-LLM breakout strategy for Dukascopy XAUUSD ticks. Entry evaluated on M5 breakout candidates; M15 bar provides confirmation and H1 defines trend filter. A small LLM classifier (context + recent microstructure features) evaluates candidate signals to reduce noise and adapt to regime shifts. Execution is tick-level, spread-aware, with ATR-based stops and fixed reward:risk exits. Risk per trade sized to ~1% equity. Designed for robust walk-forward (conservative stop multipliers, confirmation+trend filters, limited daily trades, one position at a time).
